outcome_contract.why: When the system runs work using Claude, it can't automatically track how much that work costs. This means about half of all workflow runs have a blind spot in cost reporting. Fixing this gives complete visibility into what each piece of work actually costs, making budget decisions accurate instead of estimated.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: All workflow runs — regardless of provider — automatically capture and report token costs without manual intervention.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Reads session files from `~/.claude/` which contain conversation data
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Must only read `usage` fields, not message content; only access own session
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Ensure content is never logged or stored

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Telemetry records already have provider/session fields
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Auto-capture will close the measurement gap

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Existing integration tests cover explicit-session path
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Need new tests for auto-discovery chain
Session JSONL `usage` format differs from telemetry log format — need new parser

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Codex uses tail-scanning for large files (cumulative totals per record). Claude session JSONL has per-message usage — no cumulative totals, so tail-scanning alone won't work.
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Session JSONL can grow large in long sessions (194 messages in current session). Must sum all assistant message usage fields.
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Use line-by-line streaming sum; avoid full JSON parse into memory. Bounded by message count (hundreds, not millions).

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Fail-open design — null snapshot returns `unknown` token source
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Auto-discovery added as first-preference; explicit session ID remains available

stage_payload.scope_summary: Extend the workflow telemetry system to automatically capture token usage for Claude Code sessions, closing the ~50% coverage gap left when the prior plan (do-workflow-runtime-token-capture) shipped Codex auto-capture but deferred Claude as a non-goal.
goals: Auto-discover the current Claude Code session without requiring an explicit session ID argument
Read token usage from the session JSONL (same data source Claude Code uses internally)
Produce cumulative token snapshots compatible with the existing delta-from-previous-feature-record mode
non_goals: Capturing subagent token usage separately from the parent session
key_entry_points: `scripts/src/startup-loop/ideas/workflow-runtime-token-usage.ts` — runtime token resolution module; `resolveWorkflowRuntimeTokenUsage()` is called by the telemetry recorder
`scripts/src/startup-loop/ideas/lp-do-ideas-workflow-telemetry.ts:388-394` — builds runtime token env and calls the resolver

rehearsal_issues.Resolution Required: No (test creation is part of implementation)

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: Prior non-goal based on wrong premise
